The ritual, in sound.

Every Aura Ritual pairs with a free guided meditation from Niki — light a cone, press play, and reset. Scan the QR on your box to return here anytime.

Enter Niki’s space → Listen on Spotify
The philosophy

Reset.Realign.Return.

We’ve all felt fogged — the pressure, the noise, the constant distraction of modern life. fogd. was created as a response: a reset built through simple, everyday rituals.

Reset is not one big moment. It’s something we return to with intention — a moment of scent, a line in a journal, a pause before reacting.

Real moments. Real reset.

What fogged you?

What helped you reset?

What are you returning to?

Community

Live the reset. Share the moment.

#ShareResetFogd

fogd. is made for real life, not perfect stories. Wear it your way, light a cone, take the walk — and share the moment.

Share on Instagram →
